author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone 

Naabathon - A Star Atlas Online Hackathon with $50,000 in Prizes

Builders, it's time to build something for the best community in the world!

Introducing Naabathon, an online Star Atlas hackathon with $50,000 in prizes. The categories for prizing include:
 Best Project Award SAGE Award Game Award Resources Award 
 Data Award Defi Award 
 Galactic Marketplace Award

Speedrun your building journey by using our build program (https://build.staratlas.com/) and joining the conversation in ⁠💻┃community-developers 

IMPORTANT NOTE: Submitted projects need to be created AFTER this announcement was made. That means projects already created can't be submitted.

 | Submit until September 7: https://naabathon.staratlas.com/
